package handler

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type AccountHandler struct {
	sqlDB *sql.DB
}

func (h *AccountHandler) GetAccountsByTenant(c *gin.Context) {
	tenantID := c.Param("tenant_id")
	ctx := context.Background()

	rows, err := h.sqlDB.QueryContext(ctx,
		"SELECT id, name, balance FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND status = 'active'",
		tenantID,
	)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "failed to query accounts"})
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()

	var accounts []map[string]interface{}
	for rows.Next() {
		var id, name string
		var balance float64
		rows.Scan(&id, &name, &balance)
		accounts = append(accounts, map[string]interface{}{
			"id":      id,
			"name":    name,
			"balance": balance,
		})
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"accounts": accounts})
}

func (h *AccountHandler) GetAccountCount(c *gin.Context) {
	tenantID := c.Param("tenant_id")
	ctx := context.Background()

	var count int
	err := h.sqlDB.QueryRowContext(ctx,
		"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = $1",
		tenantID,
	).Scan(&count)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "failed to count accounts"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"count": count})
}
